sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval sheet for BLUE_TESA_TAPE_LONG, part number MSV-000006, supplied by ㈜케이원코퍼레이션 to ㈜H&abyz.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents part approval cover information, revision history, material list, QC process control plan, inspection criteria, and packaging specification for the listed applicable models.
keyPoints: Product name is BLUE_TESA_TAPE_LONG and model/part number is MSV-000006.
Applicable models are G1417CW, G1417FW, G1417CWP, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, and G1717FWP.
Initial issue date is shown as 2025.03.12 with revision 0.
Material list identifies DOUBLE TAPE material tesa 70465 from maker tesa.
QC control plan covers incoming inspection, lamination, punching, cutting, inspection/packing, outgoing inspection, and shipment.

Packaging uses small package labeling and box packing, with box sizes selected by shipment quantity.

reviewFlags.reason: authoritySignal is FDA in source metadata, but the source text does not identify FDA or any regulatory authority/jurisdiction.
No standards are explicitly identified in the source text.
Revision appears as Rev. 00 on the cover and 0 in revision tables; both were preserved in revisionOrVersion.
Some extracted spreadsheet text appears to contain OCR or conversion quality issues, such as 'Produst/Part' and '현품표 부작'.
